titleStmt.title: SII 10.97: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 97. (A.R. No. 350 of 1915.) ON THE NANDI FILLAR IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF RĀMALINGASVĀMĪ, SĀTULŪRU, NARASARAOPETA TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1057.

summary.p: States that Kulōttuṅga-chōḍa-Goṅka made a gift of land to god Rāmēśvara of Chāṁchalūru in Koṇḍapaḍumaṭi country and gives details of the distribution of the land among the several servants of the temple and refers also to other gifts made by other persons to the same temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti calamartigaṁḍaḥ para
nripajīvāpaharaṇakaraye
madaṁḍaḥ nadguṇaratnakaraṁḍaḥ
kavijanaśiṣṭēṣṭavanajavanamārta
ṁḍaḥ . . yēna kṣitīśvaravarēṇa manī
ṣavārddhiḥ . puṇyāni ratnakalitā
tulajīvanāni śaśvadvivṛddhimahi
tāni ciraṁtanāni dattē samujvalaye
śōlalitōttamāni . svadatta parada
tta vā yō harēti vasuṁdhara ṣa
ṣṭivaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē krimiḥ .
yasya sphuranniśitabhīṣaṇakhaḍgadhārā
saṁpūjitā vijayakanyakayā vi
bhāti nirbhbhinnavairi gajamastakapīṭha
jātamuktākṣatōjvala karāṁbujayā
raṇāgraṁ . sōyaṁ śrī velanāṁṭigoṁkkraṁ dri
pati trailōkyadīpāṁkura stīvrājipravi
dāritārinikara ssaujanyaratnākaraḥ
prōdyallāṭavarāṭakuntalapa
tī nnirjjitya bāhāsinā tatsarvva
sva madā jagannutayaśāḥ kāmī
nijasvāminē . svasti samastapraśa
sti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśva
ra kulōttuṁggacōḍa goṁkarājulu
koṁḍapaḍumaṭi cāṁcalūri rāmēśva
radēvaraku dīpanivēdyabhōgamuna
kuṁ yīyūri muṁdaṭi peddaceṟvu

1057 gu nēṁṭi sūryyagrahaṇa
nimittamuna sthānāpatiki sā
nulaku mānulaku naṭṭavuṁḍādi
gā nibaṁddhakārlaku sarvvakara
parihāramuna Iccina datti . stā
nāpatula mallika kha 3 . kēta
rāśi kha 3 . mēlunāyakamalle
kha 3 . navelabhavu kha 6 . ma
ṟturu 2 . maddelakā ṟiddaṟaku
kha 0 . masanāsāniviṟiyaka
kha 3 . kāvāsāni ṁda kha 3 . vi
ribolla kha 3 bollasāni musyī
kha 3 brahmasāninuraka kha 3 . bo
llasānikomma kha 3 . Eṟiyasāni
komma kha 3 . dāminaṁḍa kha 3 . ka
masāni kēta kha 3 . ṁsāni
bolla kha 3 . sānimeṁṭa
kha 3 . ki kha 3
viri kha 3
mrakābe
rasi kha ri pōtinā
yaku koḍku kuṁḍu
rāmīśvara khaṁḍadī
pamunaku goṟiyalu
55 vīni bōyini
koḍku pōla puttrā
nupavitrika māneṁḍu
nēyi vōyaṁgalavāṁḍu .
mallasāni cāṁca
luri ve ku
pōtināya mīsvara
dēvaraku
kuṁ beṭṭina
niṁ jēkoni
tanaputra nityamā
neṁḍu nēyi
dēva
svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrī
manmahāmaṁḍalēśvara kulō
ttuṁggacōḍa goṁkarājulu
Ā māryyagrahananimittamu
na cāṁcalūri rāmēśvaradē
varaku yakhaṁḍḍadīpamula
ku tōṁṭayu muppaṁdumu
bhūmiyuṁ beṭṭe vīniṁ jēkoni nā
marāju putrānupavitraka
mu nityayaḍḍeṁḍu neyu
vōyaṁgalavāṁḍu . yīdi
namuna śrī goṁkarājulu
cāṁcalūri rāmēśvaradēva
raku yakhaṁḍḍadīpamuna
kuṁ beṭṭina gānuvu dīniṁ jē
koni dōrapōju putrānupa
vitrikamu nitya māneṁḍu
nēyu pōyaṁgalavāṁḍu .
cāṁcalūri māramanāya
ku koḍku Amadināyakuṁḍu
cāṁcalūri rāmīśvaradēvaraku
Akhaṁḍadīpamunakuṁ beṭṭi
na goṟiyalu 55 vīniṁ jē
koni kāṭyabōyuṁḍu
putrānupavitrikamu
nityamāneṁḍu nēyu
vōyunadi
cāṁcalūri guṁḍamanāyaku
koḍku Ēṟināyakuṁḍu cāṁca
lūri rāmīśvaradēvaraku A
khaṁḍadīpamunakuṁ beṭṭina
goṟiyalu 55 vīniṁ jēkoni
vōsanabōyuṁḍu Ā
caṁdrārkkamu nityamāneṁḍu
nēyu vōyaṁgalavāṁḍu .
cāṁcalūri viddamanāyaku
koḍuku kētamanāyakuṁḍu
rāmīsvaradēvaraku nakhaṁḍa
dīpamunakuṁ beṭṭina goṟi
yalu 55 vīniṁ jēkoni
miraḍḍi koḍku kāṭamara
ḍḍi cāṁccalūri rāmīsvara
dēvaraku Akhaṁḍadīpa
munakuṁ beṭṭina kha 1 na 10
vīniṁ jēkoni vaidyacāmi
rāju vutrānupavitri
kamugā nityamāne

cāṁcalūri Ēmara
nāyakukoḍuku
kommenāyakuṁḍu rā
mīsvaradēvaraku yakha
ṁḍadīpamunakuṁ beṭṭina
goṟiyalu 55 vīni
ṁjēkoni mallibō
yuṁḍu putrānupavi
trakamu nityamāneṁḍu
neyi vōyaṁgalavāṁḍu
venneri raḍḍi koḍuku
kūciraḍḍi vighna dēvaraku
nakhaṁḍadīpamunaku
ṁ beṭṭina goṟiyalu 55
vīniṁ jēkoni
mattaṁḍḍapu
ṁtisilenāyaku koḍu
ku prōlenāyakuṁḍu rā
mīsvaradēvaraku nakhaṁḍa
dīvamunakuṁ beṭṭina goṟi
yalu 55 vīniṁ jēkoni
siṁtanabōyuṁḍu tana pu
trānupavitrikamu nityamā
neṁḍu neyu vōyaṁgala
vāṁḍu . muttaṁḍlapuṁvī
śvaramanāyaku koḍuku E
llamanāyakuṁḍu rāmī
svaradēvaraku nakhaṁḍa
dīvamunakuṁ beṭṭina go
ṟiyalu 55 vīniṁ jē
koni baṁṭyabōyuṁḍu tana
putrānupavitrakamu
nityamāneṁḍu neyu vō
yaṁgalavāṁḍu . cāṁcca
lūri caṁḍināyaku ko
ḍku cādināyakuṁḍu
rāmīsvaradēvaraku na
khaṁḍadīpamunakuṁ be
ṭṭina kha 2 dīniṁ jēkoni ko
sinamarāju putrānu (incomplete )
Digital edition of SII 10.97 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
